---
title: "Produtos"
tbl-colwidths: [15,15,70]
---

| VC stage       | HS     | Description |
|---------------|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Final Products | 880100 | Balloons and dirigibles; gliders, hang gliders and other non-powered aircraft. |
| Final Products | 880212 | Helicopters; of an unladen weight exceeding 2000kg |
| Final Products | 880220 | Aeroplanes and other aircraft; of an unladen weight not exceeding 2000kg |
| Final Products | 880230 | Aeroplanes and other aircraft; of an unladen weight exceeding 2000kg but not exceeding 15,000kg |
| Final Products | 880240 | Aeroplanes and other aircraft; of an unladen weight exceeding 15,000kg |
| Final Products | 880211 | Helicopters; of an unladen weight not exceeding 2000kg |
| Final Products | 880260 | Spacecraft; (including satellites) and suborbital and spacecraft launch vehicles |
| Final Products | 880211 | Helicopters, except unmanned; of an unladen weight not exceeding 2000kg |
| Final Products | 880212 | Helicopters, except unmanned; of an unladen weight exceeding 2000kg |
| Final Products | 880220 | Aeroplanes and other aircraft, except unmanned; of an unladen weight not exceeding 2000kg |
| Final Products | 880230 | Aeroplanes and other aircraft, except unmanned; of an unladen weight exceeding 2000kg but not exceeding 15,000kg |
| Final Products | 880240 | Aeroplanes and other aircraft, except unmanned; of an unladen weight exceeding 15,000kg |
| Sub-assemblies | 840710 | Engines; for aircraft, spark-ignition reciprocating or rotary internal combustion piston engines |
| Sub-assemblies | 840890 | Engines; compression-ignition internal combustion piston engines (diesel or semi-diesel engines), of a kind used for other than marine propulsion or the vehicles of chapter 87 |
| Sub-assemblies | 840910 | Engines; parts of aircraft engines (spark-ignition reciprocating or rotary internal combustion piston engines) |
| Sub-assemblies | 841111 | Turbo-jets; of a thrust not exceeding 25kN |
| Sub-assemblies | 841121 | Turbo-propellers; of a power not exceeding 1100kW |
| Sub-assemblies | 841191 | Turbines; parts of turbo-jets and turbo-propellers |
| Sub-assemblies | 841210 | Engines; reaction engines, other than turbo-jets |
| Sub-assemblies | 841112 | Turbo-jets; of a thrust exceeding 25kN |
| Sub-assemblies | 841122 | Turbo-propellers; of a power exceeding 1100kW |
| Components     | 401130 | Rubber; new pneumatic tyres, of a kind used on aircraft |
| Components     | 880310 | Aircraft and spacecraft; propellers and rotors and parts thereof |
| Components     | 880320 | Aircraft and spacecraft; under-carriages and parts thereof |
| Components     | 880330 | Aircraft and spacecraft; parts of aeroplanes or helicopters n.e.c. in heading no. 8803 |
| Components     | 880390 | Aircraft and spacecraft; parts thereof n.e.c. in chapter 88 |
| Components     | 880529 | Ground flying trainers and parts thereof; other than air combat simulators and parts thereof |
| Components     | 901420 | Navigational instruments and appliances; for aeronautical or space navigation (excluding compasses) |
| Components     | 940110 | Seats; of a kind used for aircraft |
| Components     | 880510 | Aircraft launching gear, deck-arrestor or similar gear and parts thereof |
| Components     | 401213 | Retreaded tyres; of a kind used on aircraft |
| Components     | 880330 | Aircraft and spacecraft; parts of aeroplanes or helicopters n.e.s. in heading no. 8803 |
| Components     | 880521 | Ground flying trainers and parts thereof; air combat simulators and parts thereof |

: Produtos do Setor Aeroespacial, segundo o Sistema Harmonizdo {.striped .hover}
